title: Data & AI Digital Transformation
description: Guidance on transforming data management environments: technologies, practices, workflows, APIs, metadata standards, publication, and security/disclosure control.

title: Brainstorming & Strategy
description: Explore innovative ways to solve specific problems by leveraging data, modern information technology, standards, APIs, and AI.

title: Tools & Custom Solutions
description: Extending open source tools and developing custom, high-performance software solutions tailored to your unique requirements.

title: Dataset Enrichment
description: Datasets/repository assessment, quality control/assurance, packaging, metadata capture, and AI readiness preparation.

title: AI Deep Research
description: Comprehensive reports and R&D on emerging AI topics, with multi-format outputs like audio overviews and interactive websites.

title: Data Hosting & Public Services
description: High-availability data hosting in partnership with MTNA and HVDNet. Free for public services; private cloud for enterprises.
